name: sc-tiers
description: Third-party SaaS consumption rules: Firebase Firestore query limits, security rules, quota awareness, Auth listener cleanup, Hosting trailing slash and cache headers. Klaviyo API patterns: 2-step subscribe, 409→PATCH, lists, lazy loading. GTM Consent Mode v2: gtag() vs Array format, ensureGtag(), Meta Pixel consent, event taxonomy. Microsoft Clarity: best-effort model, consent-gated loading, queue init, dual push. PageSpeed Insights / Lighthouse: PSI variance, deterministic metrics, Nuxt 3 perf checklist (LCP/CLS/INP/TBT/bundle/cache).
